headline: 戴尔业绩大涨，为什么传统服务器迎来意想不到的爆发?
abstract: Bernstein报告指出，戴尔业绩大涨，传统服务器的意外爆发源于Agentic AI驱动的新需求。这类工作负载依赖CPU进行任务编排，并显著增加内存与存储需求，使传统服务器成为AI基础计算层，而非被替代对象。当前增长主要来自大型企业的计算环境更新与扩容，且仍处早期阶段，具备持续潜力。

headline: Every week, like clockwork.. Them: How did you get your followers? Me: Idk man, I just write and post my shower thoughts consistently. Them: Do you ragebait? Me: No Them: Do you reply a lot? Me: Not really, but I do if I like a take. Them: Do you post controversial things? Me: No, just mostly about tech and life. I won’t hesitate to take a stand. Them: Did you buy followers? Me: No Them: Did you do a lot of videos? Me: No Them: I don’t believe you Me: 🤷‍♂️ Leaving this here so I can just share it with the next person that DMs me. But, it’s really sad when people think you need all these shortcuts to build a following. When it’s honestly as simple as having good takes.

My son is neurodivergent. Talking to his therapist, something clicked: this isn't a defect to be corrected. It's a different operating system. And it's far more common than the word "disorder" makes it sound. We should stop pathologizing how a huge share of human minds actually work and start realizing we can do a lot more to understand ourselves and each other if we can name the action and wire up new pathways. The brain is malleable and we can choose to mold it.

Everyone's bottleneck in voice AI is the same: retrieval. The agent thinks, network round-trips to a vector DB, and the magic dies. Moss runs search at sub-10ms (no hop). Open source. This is the layer voice agents were missing. Build on it June 6-7 at the YC office.

headline: 积极防御！美银：当前市场呈现泡沫末期特征
abstract: 美银表示，其牛熊指标虽回落至9.4但仍处“极度看涨”区间，市场呈现泡沫后期特征。目前资金正从科技七巨头、比特币等“AI崇拜”资产，向白银、工业金属及小盘价值股等实体经济复苏板块轮动。美银建议2026年采取防御策略，并看好新兴市场接棒下一轮长期牛市。

headline: There are two loops in every founder's head. The autism loop: run your own model to the floor, ignore consensus, hold a thesis when everyone says you're wrong. That makes conviction. The empathy loop: feel what the user feels, sense what the market wants before it has words. That makes traction. Most people crank one and starve the other. Pure conviction builds something brilliant nobody wants. Pure empathy builds consensus mush. PG put the whole job in four words: make something people want. The autism loop makes the something. The empathy loop knows it's wanted. The founder is the bridge. Most great founders show up dominant in the first loop. That's why they're contrarian enough to try at all. The work is grafting on the second. There is no place in the world that helps founders make the two loops work together to make great startups than Y Combinator. It is the most gratifying part of our work.

英伟达MGX生态版图扩张背后：一场从800V到GPU核心的效率革命正悄然展开
abstract: 在NVIDIA MGX生态中，Innoscience正推进全氮化镓（All-GaN）电源转换技术，实现从800V高压配电至GPU核心供电的全链路覆盖。该技术不仅突破了机架功率密度上限，将前端转换满载效率提升至98.2%，还将通过引入垂直供电架构，大幅降低AI工厂的冷却需求和运营成本。
